creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fixed at 09:41 HKT / 13:41 NZST.

The http.sslcainfo setting in the mirror was wrong so it couldn't sync.

I've made a note to teach clusteradm monitoring to keep an eye on the latest commit on the mirrors and cry if it's too long ago.

Thanks again for reporting.  Enjoy your new mirror. ;-)
